sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react' import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { useDispatch, useSelector} from 'react-redux' import { } from '../slices/cart/cartSlice' import CheckoutSteps from '../components/CheckoutSteps' import FormContainer from '../components/FormContainer' import './PlaceOrderScreen.css' function PlaceOrderScreen() { const cart = useSelector(state => state.cart) const userLogin = useSelector(state => state.userLogin) const { userInfo } = userLogin return (
Place Order

Contact information:
Email: {userInfo.email}

Shipping address:
Address: {cart.shippingAddress.address}
City: {cart.shippingAddress.city}
Postal Code: {cart.shippingAddress.postalCode}
Country: {cart.shippingAddress.country}

Payment method:
{cart.paymentMethod}

Return to cart
{cart.cartItems.length === 0 ?

Your cart is empty

: (<> {cart.cartItems.map((item, index) => (

{item.name}
{item.price}€

Qty:
{item.qty}

Price:
{item.qty*item.price}€

))} )}

Subtotal: {}€

Shipping: {}€

Total: {}€

) } export default PlaceOrderScreen
